accepted.reason: Signature-kernel dynamic-programming recurrences over path increments are high-value numerical sequence kernels.
Snowpack/evaporation/melt state updates provide practical geophysical process-model loop logic.
Stationary distribution estimation from generated contexts is a useful probabilistic sequence-analysis kernel.
Insertion and merge sort routines remain strong baseline algorithmic optimization examples.
Natural-parameter accumulation and mean-field updates are compact inference kernels with nested loops.
Type/shape keyed dispatch and kernel caching logic is high-signal runtime optimization control flow.

skipped.reason: Primarily C++ topology file wrapper glue with heavy external type dependencies and low standalone kernel value.
Cython language/runtime conversion test suite, not a target algorithmic workload.
Single boolean membership check is too trivial for meaningful Cython optimization training.
Decoder API wrapper around external library calls has limited standalone algorithmic content.
